author: Ismail Ivanov
description: Trello-style task boards with Markdown-backed cards, labels, dates, and checklists. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ismail Ivanov
manifest.description: Trello-style task boards with Markdown-backed cards, labels, dates, and checklists.
manifest.name: Task Deck

name: Task Deck

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Assign checklist items to members.

- Each checklist item now has a member circle at its far left. Click it to assign that item to a Sync Deck member (or leave it Unassigned). Assigned items show the member's avatar; unassigned show an empty circle.
- The assignment is stored per item inside the note (as a hidden comment), so it syncs across devices and leaves existing checklists unchanged.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Rich card descriptions with images, plus a tidier board layout.

**Card descriptions**
- New Trello-style description editor with a formatting toolbar.
- Add images by paste, drag & drop, or the **Add image** button (works on mobile). Images render **inline where you add them**, at a sensible size, and long descriptions collapse behind **Show more**.

**Tidier board files**
- Card notes now live in `<board>/cards/` and images/videos in `<board>/attachments/`. Existing media is migrated automatically. Card notes keep a stable identity so this stays safe across devices synced with Sync Deck.

**Polish & fixes**
- Compact, correctly-proportioned card tiles; roomier card modal.
- Card details no longer truncate when a line starts with `## ` (code blocks included).

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck now syncs.

- **Cloud sync + live presence via [Sync Deck](https://github.com/ismailivanov/sync-deck)** — your boards sync across your devices and with teammates, and you can see who's on which card in real time. A new **Sync your boards & vaults** button opens Sync Deck.
- **Boards auto-sync** — remote changes to your board notes show up automatically; the manual **Sync** button is still there.
- **Fix:** deleting several cards at once no longer resurrects them.
- Polish and small fixes throughout.

### Install
Enable **Task Deck** from Obsidian's *Community plugins*, or drop `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `.obsidian/plugins/task-deck/`.
releases.name: 0.2.0 — Cloud sync with Sync Deck

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description: Fix board discovery after synced files arrive so Task Deck can restore existing boards from Markdown index files.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.8

- Added Relay-friendly realtime collaboration guidance and settings shortcut.
- Improved board folder restoration for Markdown-backed boards.
- Polished board/card UI, icons, autosave, labels, dates, checklist progress, and completion feedback.
- Keeps release assets aligned for Obsidian installs: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.7

- Adds a completion animation when cards are marked done.
- Adds a subtle card pulse, checkbox pop, and title settle effect.
- Respects reduced-motion preferences.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.6

- Uses the provided bink.wav sound for completed cards.
- Embeds the sound in main.js so Obsidian installs do not need an extra audio file.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.5

- Adds a short completion sound when a card is marked complete.
- Adds a settings toggle to turn the completion sound on or off.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.4

- Fixes empty card labels being parsed as metadata such as completed: false.
- Cleans metadata-like labels from existing saved label data on load.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.3

- Publishes the latest Task Deck build with the custom ribbon icon.
- Keeps release assets aligned with the manifest version for Obsidian installs.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Task Deck 0.1.2

- Adds a custom Task Deck ribbon icon.
- Keeps Task Deck cards connected in Obsidian graph view with an auto-generated board index note.
- Uses readable Markdown filenames for cards created from the board.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description:
Prepare Task Deck for Obsidian community plugin submission.

Changes:
- Use the store-safe plugin id task-deck.
- Add fundingUrl to manifest.
- Update command and install text.
- Include release assets for Obsidian: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.

releases.author: ismailivanov
releases.description: Initial Task Deck release.\n\nIncludes the kanban board view, Markdown-backed cards, global labels, start and due dates, checklists, card note sync, settings, and support links.
